description: Performance regression baseline — CI should fail if p95 exceeds threshold

dom_fingerprint.description: DOM fingerprint calculation on a 5000-node DOM
dom_fingerprint.measurement: time to compute SHA-256 of serialized DOM snapshot

ws_round_trip.measurement: time from ws.send(heartbeat) to response received

pii_redaction.description: PII redaction on 10KB text with 20 PII instances
pii_redaction.measurement: time to run _redact_pii on mixed PII text

ipc_validation.description: IPC schema validation for all 9 message types
ipc_validation.measurement: time to validate a message against _MESSAGE_SCHEMAS

regression_policy.rebaseline_when: hardware change or intentional algorithm change
